title: Note Block Charged
description: Adds in a charged note block that plays electric guitar notes.
body:
# Note Block Charged

⁤The Note Block Charged mod introduces a special note block that, when charged with a lightning bolt directly on the block or a lightning rod above it getting struck with lightning, plays electric guitar notes. The block is crafted with any planks in a cauldron formation, a redstone dust in the middle, and either a gold, iron, or copper ingot in the top middle slot. Note Block Charged adds a handy musical element to your Minecraft experience. Whether you're a note block enthusiast or just looking to enhance your gameplay with rad sounds, this mod offers a new avenue for creating note block variants of real songs.

### Requires Fabric API to run

## Second mod I've made
This is my second mod creation; however, this is the first that I will be uploading to anything other than github. If there are any bugs you spot or suggestions, don't hesitate to let me know on github.
